mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_group (store_name, address, contact, created_at) VALUES (#{storeName}, #{address}, #{contact}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT g.id, g.store_name, g.address, g.contact, g.created_at FROM wms_group g JOIN wms_user_profile p ON g.id = p.group_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, store_name, address, contact, created_at FROM wms_group WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE wms_user_profile SET group_id = #{groupId} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE wms_group SET store_name = #{storeName} WHERE id = #{groupId}
UPDATE wms_group SET address = #{address} WHERE id = #{groupId}
UPDATE wms_group SET contact = #{contact} WHERE id = #{groupId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, group_id, role, nickname FROM wms_user_profile WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_join_request (user_id, group_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{groupId}) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT g.id, g.store_name, g.address, g.contact, g.created_at FROM wms_group g JOIN wms_join_request r ON g.id = r.group_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT p.user_id, p.group_id, p.role, p.nickname FROM wms_user_profile p JOIN wms_join_request r ON p.user_id = r.user_id WHERE r.group_id = #{groupId}
